A '''Rodian contact''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who lived in [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine's]] [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]]. A few months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] dispatched [[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Renegade Squadron]] to Mos Eisley to free a group of Rebel prisoners who were being held by the [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]]. When Renegade Squadron captured the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] the Rodian was in at the time, he offered to bring the Rebels to where they were holding the captives. He led the Renegades across the street—with the Rebels protecting him from the local [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] that was attacking—to a [[Sail barge/Legends|sail barge]] [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] that the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] were using as a temporary prison for their captives. Renegade Squadron then freed the prisoners and took them back to their base on [[Boz Pity/Legends|Boz Pity]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]''
